name: Synup Social vs. Sendible
hero_summary: Social media shouldn’t be painful, overwhelming, or complex. Synup Social provides the engagement-driving features and monitoring capabilities of Sendible with a lower price tag and an intuitive user experience. Empower your clients to take control of their social media with less hassle and more ease. With shareable, white-labeled content calendars that clients can view and approve any time to post-by-post analytics reports at your clients’ fingertips, Synup Social is the collaborative social media management platform that empowers you to outperform the competition.
counter_text_1: say they can effortlessly collaborate with their teams
counter_text_2: of users say they’ve cut their social media management time in half
counter_text_3: average growth in engagement in the first 6 months
section_2_heading: Built for agencies; loved by brands
section_2_summary: Synup Social is built for your agency’s success. From crossing wires with your team to wasting marketing dollars, Sendible gives your team more trouble than it’s worth! With an intuitive interface and smart, white-labeled features, Synup Social is the perfect solution for brands and agencies alike. With the right tool, watch your team become more motivated, productive, and inspired. Here’s why Synup Social is the right tool for you:
section_2_slider_1_summary: Sendible and Synup Social are both built with agencies in mind, but with revolutionary white-labeling on everything from social media calendars to analytics reports, Synup Social is the clear choice. With shareable links that empower your clients to view post-by-post analytics, comment on your content calendar, approve posts, and connect their social accounts, you can ditch your spreadsheets and build an efficient workflow.
section_2_slider_2_heading: Collaboration is the name of the game
section_2_slider_2_summary: Easily collaborate with your team and your clients at no extra cost. It starts with an approval workflow: your team can create drafts, edit others’ work, and get posts approved. Then, you can share white-labeled analytics and content calendars with clients - no login required! With Synup Social, everything is streamlined; banish the headache of back-and-forth edits for good!
section_2_slider_3_heading: Unique post ideas & AI-powered content creation
section_2_step_3_summary: Unlike Sendible, post creation is our specialty. Use our revolutionary post generator to show clients how well you understand their business. From reviving their best posts to following what’s hot or copying the competition, you won’t run out of inspiration! The best part? These posts are guaranteed to rack up likes. With smart, AI-powered industry research, get ready to see your clients’ engagement soar. Write posts in their distinct brand voice to create content faster than ever before. Say goodbye to writers’ block!
section_2_slider_4_summary: Synup Social is the platform for growth. Sendible doesn’t help your team when it comes to content creation and strategy, but we’ll help you craft a winning strategy. Easily share analytics via downloadable reports or shareable, white-labeled links - so your boss (or clients!) can see your growth without a login. We even give you key insights, from the best time to post to post-by-post analytics, so you can nail it every time.
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Why you should choose Synup Social over Sendible?
why_choose_tab_desc_1: We Post For Every Social Platform
why_choose_tab_desc_2: We Help You Generate Ideas & Boost Posts
why_choose_content_summary: Boost your brand presence on social media with our AI-powered platform. Create, publish, and track engagement of your posts all in one place, and go live in just minutes. Results guaranteed 🚀.
testimonial_summary: Social media management teams love Synup Social for its robust analytics, content inspiration, ease of post creation, and streamlined interface. Teams that make the switch to Synup Social benefit from an enhanced collaboration workflow, spending less time creating and editing content and more time engaging with their audience!
customer_review_1_name: Bree M - Director Of Marketing And Community Relations
customer_review_1_summary: I can use their services as a platform to make sure all my business locations are up to date with all the correct information. I don't have to go to all these other sites to change hours when we have a holiday!
customer_review_2_name: Elisa Rose L - Vice President & Founding Member
customer_review_2_summary: Synup is very user friendly and very effective at claiming and updating directory listings for businesses. Reviews requests are also easy to send out and respond to right from the same dashboard.
section_3_summary: Synup Social saves you time and money by inspiring your team and building better workflows. From post-creation and trend research to analytics, Synup Social is the perfect choice for agencies and brands alike. To win clients and drive engagement, you need a data-driven, content-forward platform. With advanced features like a collaborative approval workflow and shareable, white-labeled analytics and post calendars, Synup Social is the invaluable tool your team needs to succeed. Let’s see how it stacks up against Sendible:

seo.title: The Best Sendible Alternative for Social Media Management
seo.description: Synup Social is a powerful social media management platform that offers all the features of Sendible at a lower price point. With Synup Social, you can create engaging content, track your performance, and collaborate with your team all in one place.
